codingtitle: I am a self-taught programmer who has spent the last three years immersed in programming. I enjoy solving problems and finding new approaches to various puzzles.
designtitle: I am also a fan of visual design, enjoying the creation of visually pleasing pages. Over the last year, I have deepened my expertise in the area of UI/UX design.

moder.name: Moder
moder.description: I had the opportunity to primarily delve into the world of web development. Over the course of two years, I gained valuable experience and developed my skills with several technologies, such as Vue, Laravel, MySQL, Tailwind CSS, and virtual machines. This experience has given me a solid foundation for developing web applications.

kvh.name: KVH
kvh.description: Is my first proper web design project where I had the opportunity to design and implement a website from start to finish. The site is designed with Figma, built with Vue and Tailwind, using the Email.Js library to send emails. The website was designed and built in collaboration with KVH.

more.name: More projects coming soon
more.description: I'm currently working on new project and will be adding it to my portfolio soon.

docker.title: Docker
docker.description: Lightweight virtual machine for operating applications in various environments, simplifying program transfer and use on different computers.

figma.title: Figma
figma.description: Web-based UI/UX design tool, used for creating prototypes and testing user interfaces before implementation.

github.title: GitHub
github.description: Comprehensive version control and collaboration platform for software development, enabling code sharing, tracking and version management.

javascript.title: JavaScript
javascript.description: Versatile programming language commonly used in web pages as a frontend language, but also in backend applications through Node.js.

laravel.title: Laravel
laravel.description: PHP framework for modern web applications, offering a wide range of tools and libraries for fast, secure, and maintainable development.

mysql.title: MySQL
mysql.description: Database software used for storing, transferring, and manipulating data on websites and applications.

npm.title: NPM
npm.description: JavaScript package management system, used for distributing packages and managing dependencies in Node.js projects.

php.title: PHP
php.description: Server-side programming language for developing web applications, used as a backend language for creating pages and database applications.

tailwindCSS.title: Tailwind
tailwindCSS.description: CSS framework that speeds up and simplifies the styling of web pages. It streamlines the development process by providing ready-made styles.

vue.title: Vue
vue.description: JavaScript-based framework for front-end development, for building dynamic and reactive web pages and user interfaces.
